---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

What developer or user problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the behavior, contract, or workflow you want.

## Alternatives Considered

What other options did you consider?

## Impact Area

- [ ] Core API
- [ ] Auth or key management
- [ ] IBM profile or hardware jobs
- [ ] Qiskit domain services
- [ ] JS SDK
- [ ] Python SDK
- [ ] PennyLane plugin
- [ ] Engine client
- [ ] Docs or contributor workflow

## Compatibility

- [ ] Backwards compatible
- [ ] Needs a deprecation path
- [ ] Breaking change

## Validation Plan

How should this be tested or documented?
